steps.title: Identify the Contrast Signal
steps.content: The “but” immediately after the underlined portion marks a shift: from MOCA's stated justification to the author's objection. The underlined sentence presents MOCA's own rationale for using video presentations for certain games.

steps.title: Match the Function
steps.content: It provides MOCA's rationale for a decision that the author critiques. captures this relationship: the underlined portion provides MOCA's rationale, which the author then critiques.
